label: Tile mutator
description: Defines a world tile modifier that can change map generation, terrain, biome resources, weather, landmarks, or placement rules.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# class that implements the tile mutator logic. Loaded from XML even though private in source.

genOrder.label: Gen order
genOrder.description: Execution order among mutators during map generation. Lower values run first.

categories.label: Categories
categories.description: Category tags this mutator belongs to. Used to group or filter mutators.

overrideCategories.label: Override categories
overrideCategories.description: Category tags this mutator overrides when applied, replacing the default category set.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Selection priority when multiple mutators compete for the same tile. Higher values win.

displayPriority.label: Display priority
displayPriority.description: Sort order for displaying this mutator in UI lists. Lower values appear first.

chanceOnNonLandmarkTile.label: Chance on non-landmark tile
chanceOnNonLandmarkTile.description: Probability (0-1) of this mutator being applied to tiles that are not landmark tiles.

extraGenSteps.label: Extra gen steps
extraGenSteps.description: Additional map generation steps injected when this mutator is active.

preventGenSteps.label: Prevent gen steps
preventGenSteps.description: Map generation steps blocked from running when this mutator is active.

overrideCoastalBeachTerrain.label: Override coastal beach terrain
overrideCoastalBeachTerrain.description: TerrainDef that replaces the default coastal beach terrain on mutated tiles.

overrideLakeBeachTerrain.label: Override lake beach terrain
overrideLakeBeachTerrain.description: TerrainDef that replaces the default lake beach terrain on mutated tiles.

overrideRiverbankTerrain.label: Override riverbank terrain
overrideRiverbankTerrain.description: TerrainDef that replaces the default riverbank terrain on mutated tiles.

overrideMudTerrain.label: Override mud terrain
overrideMudTerrain.description: TerrainDef that replaces the default mud terrain on mutated tiles.

preventsPondGeneration.label: Prevents pond generation
preventsPondGeneration.description: When true, pond generation is suppressed on tiles with this mutator.

preventsLandmarks.label: Prevents landmarks
preventsLandmarks.description: When true, landmark generation is suppressed on tiles with this mutator.

preventNaturalElevation.label: Prevent natural elevation
preventNaturalElevation.description: When true, natural elevation variation is not applied to tiles with this mutator.

preventPatches.label: Prevent patches
preventPatches.description: When true, terrain patch generation is suppressed on tiles with this mutator.

animalDensityFactor.label: Animal density factor
animalDensityFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the base animal population density on mutated tiles.

plantDensityFactor.label: Plant density factor
plantDensityFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the base plant density on mutated tiles.

junkDensityFactor.label: Junk density factor
junkDensityFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the base junk scatter density on mutated tiles.

geyserCountFactor.label: Geyser count factor
geyserCountFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the base geyser count on mutated tiles.

chunkDensityFactor.label: Chunk density factor
chunkDensityFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the base rock chunk scatter density on mutated tiles.

fishPopulationFactor.label: Fish population factor
fishPopulationFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the base fish population on mutated tiles.

additionalWildPlants.label: Additional wild plants
additionalWildPlants.description: Extra plants added to the wild plant roster on mutated tiles. Each element name is the ThingDef defName; scalar text is the commonality.

overrideDensityForFertilityCurve.label: Override density for fertility curve
overrideDensityForFertilityCurve.description: Curve mapping base fertility to a density multiplier, overriding the biome's default density-for-fertility relationship.

allowRoofedEdgeWalkIn.label: Allow roofed edge walk-in
allowRoofedEdgeWalkIn.description: When true, pawns can enter the map through roofed edge cells on tiles with this mutator.

blacklistedRaidStrategies.label: Blacklisted raid strategies
blacklistedRaidStrategies.description: Raid strategies that cannot be used against colonies on tiles with this mutator.

additionalGameConditions.label: Additional game conditions
additionalGameConditions.description: Game conditions that are active on tiles with this mutator.

hillinessForElevationGen.label: Hilliness for elevation gen
hillinessForElevationGen.description: Hilliness value used to determine elevation generation on tiles with this mutator, overriding the tile's natural hilliness.

hillinessForOreGeneration.label: Hilliness for ore generation
hillinessForOreGeneration.description: Hilliness value used to determine ore vein generation on tiles with this mutator, overriding the tile's natural hilliness.

hillinessLabel.label: Hilliness label
hillinessLabel.description: Hilliness value shown in UI labels for tiles with this mutator, overriding the tile's natural hilliness label.

biomeWhitelist.label: Biome whitelist
biomeWhitelist.description: Biomes on which this mutator can appear. If empty, the mutator can appear in any biome not on the blacklist.

biomeBlacklist.label: Biome blacklist
biomeBlacklist.description: Biomes on which this mutator cannot appear.

animalDensityRange.label: Animal density range
animalDensityRange.description: Required range of the tile's animal density for this mutator to be eligible.

plantDensityRange.label: Plant density range
plantDensityRange.description: Required range of the tile's plant density for this mutator to be eligible.

minHilliness.label: Min hilliness
minHilliness.description: Minimum hilliness required for this mutator to be eligible on a tile.

maxHilliness.label: Max hilliness
maxHilliness.description: Maximum hilliness at which this mutator is eligible on a tile.

coastSidesRange.label: Coast sides range
coastSidesRange.description: Required range of coastal sides (0-4) on a tile for this mutator to be eligible.

canSpawnOnRiver.label: Can spawn on river
canSpawnOnRiver.description: Whether this mutator can appear on tiles that have a river.

canSpawnOnRoad.label: Can spawn on road
canSpawnOnRoad.description: Whether this mutator can appear on tiles that have a road.

canSpawnOnLandmark.label: Can spawn on landmark
canSpawnOnLandmark.description: Whether this mutator can appear on tiles that are landmarks.

requiresFactionOfDef.label: Requires faction of def
requiresFactionOfDef.description: FactionDef that must be present in the world for this mutator to be eligible.

pollutionRange.label: Pollution range
pollutionRange.description: Required range of tile pollution level for this mutator to be eligible.

averageTemperatureRange.label: Average temperature range
averageTemperatureRange.description: Required range of average tile temperature (in Celsius) for this mutator to be eligible.

weatherFrequencyFactor.label: Weather frequency factor
weatherFrequencyFactor.description: Multiplier applied to all weather event frequencies on tiles with this mutator.

weatherFrequencyOffset.label: Weather frequency offset
weatherFrequencyOffset.description: Flat additive offset applied to weather event frequencies on tiles with this mutator.

weathersToAffect.label: Weathers to affect
weathersToAffect.description: Weather types whose frequency is modified by weatherFrequencyFactor and weatherFrequencyOffset.

terrainPatchMakers.label: Terrain patch makers
terrainPatchMakers.description: Perlin-noise terrain patch generators run during map generation on tiles with this mutator.

plantKinds.label: Plant kinds
plantKinds.description: ThingDefs allowed to grow as wild plants on tiles with this mutator.

structureGenParms.label: Structure gen parms
structureGenParms.description: Parameters controlling ancient structure generation on tiles with this mutator.

resourceBlacklist.label: Resource blacklist
resourceBlacklist.description: ThingDefs that cannot appear as resources on tiles with this mutator.
